session.name: MPI-276 Phase 2a shipped — resume at Phase 2b (store wire + adapter split)

goal.original: Kill the download/install/uninstall subsystem's 5 root diseases with an installStore SOT + engine adapters + reconciler + snapshot protocol + FE mirror + unified uninstall + Pod wrapper fixes (MPI-276).
goal.summary: Phase 1 (pure core) + Phase 2a (disease cure) shipped and committed. Phase 2a deleted refCount everywhere, fixed totalBytes accumulation, and added register-before-respond — all against the existing runtime maps. Store instantiation was DEFERRED to 2b to avoid two live SOTs mid-refactor. Resume at 2b.

pending: Phase 2b: instantiate createInstallStore as SOT replacing _modelJobs/_depJobs; physical adapter split (G6: localAdapter.js/remoteAdapter.js); ResumableDownloader->FileDownloader rename (sweep engine.js:17+:140); snapshot version into status + /download/start responses
Phase 4+5 parallel batch: FE mirror + uninstall unification
Phase 6: Pod wrapper 0.2.36->0.2.37 (hot-store evict + pipPins; separate repo git -C c:/AI/Mpi/mpi-ci)

next_action.description: Start Phase 2b: instantiate createInstallStore({broadcast:_broadcast, logger, now}) in downloadManager.js as the SOT, migrate _modelJobs/_depJobs reads+writes onto it, physically split localAdapter.js + remoteAdapter.js out of downloadManager.js (G6), rename ResumableDownloader->FileDownloader (also update engine.js:17 import + :140 use), and add the monotonic version field into GET /downloads/status + the /download/start response snapshots (G9). Keep all G6 public export names/signatures. Preserve everything in the phase2-carve.md 'Preserve verbatim (G4)' list.

key_decisions: 2a/2b split: 2a = disease cure (refCount delete + totalBytes SET + register-before-respond) committed against existing runtime maps; 2b = store instantiation + physical adapter file split. Same end state, commit-safe intermediate.

Store DEFERRED to 2b (user confirmed this session): wiring installStore as a live parallel SOT alongside _modelJobs in 2a would create two SOTs — the exact disease being cured. Store becomes SOT only when it REPLACES the maps in 2b.
version field not added in 2a because the store (which owns the monotonic version) is not wired yet; status endpoint returns {success,jobs:[]} for now — version lands with the store in 2b.
refCount was pure dead weight: MPI-258 already made the two real gates (_depHasActiveDownloadConsumer, _otherActiveModelUsesDep) status-based; deleting the field + its writes changed no behavior.
engine.js refCount:1 field was on a hand-built depJob for the engine-archive path (G15 out of scope) but never read by ResumableDownloader — deleted as dead, zero behavior change.
constraints: Shared tree: downloadManager.js, js/shell.js, kanban files edited by peers mid-task — content-anchor edits, re-read on stale-Edit, re-grep after. Never git add . / -A.

G6: public exports must keep name+signature (cancelAllDownloads, registerEngineDownload, clearEngineDownload, startUniversalWorkflowInstall, finishCustomNodeInstall, runCustomNodeInstall, broadcastEngineEvent, ResumableDownloader->FileDownloader). engine.js + shutdown depend on them.

G4 preserve verbatim: NDH cancel-only transport (NEVER reintroduce pause/resume), .cubricdl contract, sha256 verify, path resolvers, _filterDepsForEngine/_withEngineExtraDeps, _localSharedDepsMap/_remoteSharedDepIds whole-model-installed rule, disk-full pre-flight, _extractZipArchive, _nodeFolderHasFiles (MPI-243), all wrapper endpoint signatures, all existing SSE event NAMES.

Port 3000 is user-owned — never kill their app. Route/module tests: load module or mount router alone on :3999 from repo root (needs repo-root cwd for node_modules), curl, revert. Not /tmp (no node_modules).
Pod wrapper (Phase 6) is a SEPARATE repo commit: git -C c:/AI/Mpi/mpi-ci.

resume_prompt: You are resuming MPI-276 (download/install/uninstall refactor) on branch 1.2.0. Read .agents/mpi-kanban/state/handoffs/b3917753-4d64-4d0d-bff7-11165caab395.json and then run mpi-continue. Phases 1 (installStore + computeProgress core, 0d4f0301) and 2a (disease cure: refCount DELETED everywhere, totalBytes += changed to SET on both engines, register-before-respond adding a job snapshot to all three /download/start responses, 5bbf08f2) are shipped and committed against the existing _modelJobs/_depJobs runtime maps. The installStore was intentionally NOT wired live in 2a to avoid two competing sources of truth. Your next action is Phase 2b: instantiate createInstallStore as the single source of truth (replacing _modelJobs/_depJobs), physically split localAdapter.js and remoteAdapter.js out of routes/downloadManager.js per Gate G6, rename ResumableDownloader to FileDownloader (also updating routes/engine.js:17 import and :140 use), and add the monotonic snapshot version field into GET /comfy/downloads/status and the /download/start response bodies per Gate G9. Read .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-276/handoffs/phase2-carve.md first for verified carve anchors and the G4 preserve-verbatim list, then plan.md for full phase detail. Keep all G6 public export names and signatures intact. Shared tree: never git add . — content-anchor edits, re-grep after.
